# Golam Mahadi

> Official research and professional portfolio of Golam Mahadi, an MSc Computer Science student and Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC) scholar at Dalian University of Technology.

Golam Mahadi researches reinforcement learning for LLVM compiler optimization and SAT-solving workloads, RL-guided UAV trajectory planning, multi-agent path prediction, PP2D spatial models and battery Doyle-Fuller-Newman modelling. He graduated in Software Engineering from Zhengzhou University in 2025 and works in IT and Foreign Sales at Dayang International Company.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://gmpilot.github.io/portfolio2024/): official profile and overview
- [Research](https://gmpilot.github.io/portfolio2024/research.html): active research tracks and scope
- [Publications](https://gmpilot.github.io/portfolio2024/publications.html): four publications with citations
- [Projects](https://gmpilot.github.io/portfolio2024/projects.html): research prototypes and software projects
- [Services](https://gmpilot.github.io/portfolio2024/services.html): freelance web development, SEO, AI and research support
- [Experience](https://gmpilot.github.io/portfolio2024/experience.html): education, work and skills
- [Contact](https://gmpilot.github.io/portfolio2024/contact.html): collaboration and project enquiries
